title: Prisoner Trump: The Don of Cell Block B
original_title: Prisoner Trump: The Don of Cell Block B
overview: When Donald Trump and Rudy Giuliani are sent to prison, Trump seizes the moment to build his next empire. Armed with “Trump Bucks” and outrageous plans, he seeks to rule the prison in this clever and biting political satire.
